name: Boss is mad I filed after ladder fall, can he fire me?

mainEntity.name: Boss is mad I filed after ladder fall, can he fire me?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**No, retaliation illegal** under Utah/Idaho law.[3]

Protected activity; document threats, file complaint if fired.

- Keep claim records.
- Note performance pre-injury.
- Unemployment if terminated.

Report to labor board; sue if needed.
